title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 109.
content:
There was a Young Lady of Parma,
    Whose conduct grew calmer and calmer;
    When they said, "Are you dumb?"
    She merely said, "Hum!"
    That provoking Young Lady of Parma.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 109."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
